title: verbesina scandens
intro: Verbesina scandens, also known as the climbing crown flower or creeping crown flower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Verbesina scandens is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically to skin conditions such as eczema and wounds.
